Actions.Text: REFERRED TO RACING, GAMING AND WAGERING

Title: Requires mobile sports wagering operators to share monthly invoice statements to authorized consumers
Summary: Requires mobile sports wagering operators to share monthly invoice statements to authorized consumers; specifies information required.
LawSection: Racing, Pari-Mutuel Wagering and Breeding Law
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the racing, pari-mutuel wagering and breeding law, in relation to requiring mobile sports wagering operators to share monthly invoice statements to authorized consumers
